text.title: Embedding Models Procedure
text.summary: 5-step model selection procedure from shortlist to validated artefact.

step.name: shortlist
step.action: Rank by MTEB retrieval score (not aggregate). Pick top 3 within budget.

step.name: tune-provider-params
step.action: OpenAI v3 → set `dimensions`. Cohere → set `input_type`. Mistral → set `max_context_tokens` <= 512. BGE-M3 → adapt sparse output.

step.name: domain-bench
step.action: Run Recall@10 per candidate with batch_size 32–128.

step.name: pick-winner
step.action: Pick highest domain_recall10 within cost budget. Tie-break on storage cost (smaller dim wins).

step.name: commit-selection
step.action: Pin model_name + model_version; record provider_quirks; commit model-selection.json.
